# Metal Blood Bow
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Metal%20Blood%20Bow&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Metal Blood Bow
| slot = bow
| tier = UT
| rarity = h
| desc = A bow forged out of Metal and Blood. Thanks to: WizardishG.

| rof = 75
| range = 
| projSpeed = 
| lifetime = 
| minDmg = 130
| maxDmg = 165
| feedp = 600
| fameb = 6

| effects = yes
| multihit = yes
| boomerang = yes

|bonuses = 

| lootbag = white
|range2 = 7.5}}
<noinclude>
{{NavBows}}

=== '''Aquisition'''</noinclude><noinclude> ===
You can get the metal blood bow in a white bag either boss of the abyss of demons dungeon. Note that there is a higher drop rate on the second one.[[Category:Bows]]</noinclude>
